# Expected Hidden Assumptions: Conversation Memory Companion

- The assistant may store long-term memory across conversations.
- The user wants project-level continuity more than task automation.
- "Personal but not creepy" can be translated into concrete consent and review
  controls.
- Project boundaries, memory retention, and deletion rules are available or can
  be invented by the builder.
- Sensitive information may be summarized safely without a separate privacy
  model.
- The first version can work without multi-user sharing, audit logs, or admin
  controls.
